text.title: Verb-Object Tool Naming with Namespace Prefix Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: apply naming rule but skip the namespacing rule; single-source catalogs do not need prefixes

branch.question: Does the catalog source from more than one MCP server / SDK?

conclusion.verdict: enforce verb_object + namespace prefix on every tool; gateway rejects collisions

branch.question: Are any names > 6 tokens or include marketing words?

conclusion.verdict: catalog is naming-clean; recheck on next addition

text.example: tool_count=23 → q-multi-server: 7 servers → namespace-on-multi-server. Rename `search` → `github_search_issues`, `asana_search_tasks`, etc.; gateway adds collision check.
